title: Tayo muna habang hindi pa tayo
original_title: Tayo Muna Habang Hindi Pa Tayo
overview: A soft boy. A strong girl. Tayo Muna Habang Hindi Pa Tayo is a love story that comes close but not far enough. When Alex DTR-ed and found out that Carlo is not ready to commit to a relationship, Alex must ask herself if love can survive without commitment.
